note: Peak houseboat season, 22-30°C. Backwaters calm, paddy fields green, no monsoon rain. Book Kainakary routes 3-4 days ahead.
Kochi-Muziris Biennale runs through March. Fort Kochi pleasant 22-30°C. Evening Chinese-net photos at golden hour, no crowds at dawn.
Float festival at Meenakshi temple (full moon week). Cool mornings 18-28°C. Pongal celebrations mid-month — town decked in kolam.
Peak weather 20-28°C, French Quarter pleasant for walking. Auroville Music Festival end of month. Rock Beach packed weekends — go weekdays.
Pongal festival mid-month. Dance Festival at Shore Temple ongoing (Dec-Jan). 20-28°C, dry, all monuments accessible. Stone carving workshops open.
Thyagaraja Aradhana music festival mid-month (Thiruvaiyaru, 13km). Brihadeeswara temple 18-28°C, no humidity. Bronze gallery quiet weekdays.
Clearest sunrise-sunset views of the year. 22-30°C. Vivekananda Rock ferry runs all day. Three oceans visible — no heat haze until March.
Perfect mansion-tour weather 20-30°C. Karaikudi town markets lively for Pongal. Antique hunting at weekly Saturday market — best deals mid-morning.
Pilgrimage peak, 22-30°C. Ramanathaswamy temple corridor bath ritual — start at 5am before crowds. Ferry to Dhanushkodi calm seas all month.
Best month 18-28°C. Virupaksha sunrise walk cool. Tungabhadra boulder climbs dry. Matanga Hill sunset no haze. Book huts at Hampi Bazaar in advance.
